steps.title: Compute b as 90% less than 47
steps.content:
• 90% less than 47 means subtract 90% of 47 from 47.
  • $$b = 47 - 0.90 \times 47 = 47(1-0.90) = 47 \times 0.10 = 4.7$$

steps.title: Compute a as 110% greater than b
steps.content:
• 110% greater than b means add 110% of b to b.
  • $$a = b + 1.10b = b(1+1.10) = 2.10b = 2.10 \times 4.7 = 9.87$$
  • The answer is 9.87.
